entries.title: Classic
entries.description: Standard Wordle scoring—green, yellow, gray. Pick a word length, then play with six guesses.

entries.title: Streak
entries.description: Chain words back-to-back with six guesses each. Fail once and the run ends. Best streak is saved locally.

entries.title: Zen
entries.description: Unlimited guesses, scrolling six-row board, no loss. Solve to move to the next word.

entries.title: Zen Infinite
entries.description: Like Zen, but wins chain instantly with no pause—endless relaxed practice.

entries.title: Colorless
entries.description: No tile colors—white tiles show letters that are in the word (green/yellow are both white), gray tiles are absent.

entries.title: Word 500
entries.description: You see green/yellow/red feedback and counts, and you can tap tiles to add your own notes. No exact per-tile positions.

entries.title: Memory colors
entries.description: Colors flash briefly after each guess—remember the feedback. Six guesses.

entries.title: Memory letters
entries.description: Tile colors stay visible; only the letters in past guesses are hidden. Plain keyboard until the round ends.

entries.title: Banned
entries.description: Normal Wordle with one banned common letter per guess (except the last). Bans avoid letters in the answer.

entries.title: Forced letter
entries.description: Each guess (except the last) must include a random letter anywhere; the letter changes after every guess (white key).

entries.title: Locked
entries.description: One letter locked to one position; infinite tries until the timer ends. Score vs total possible words.

entries.title: Doubles
entries.description: Target and every guess must use at least one letter twice (pools, snags, …). Length 2–12 (not 1).

entries.title: Blocked
entries.description: One wildcard tile per row—type the rest; any dictionary word that fits is a valid guess.

entries.title: Spaces
entries.description: Wildcard column on early rows; each skip adds a bonus row (two fixed blocks) before your final guess.

entries.title: Misleading Tile
entries.description: Exactly one wrong tile per guess. Keyboard matches those colors; conflicting green/grey for a letter leaves the key blank. Ten guesses.

entries.title: Infinite
entries.description: Sliding answers. Guess up to six times per round; when you solve, the last two guesses slide away and a new answer appears.

entries.title: Word chain
entries.description: Reach a goal word by changing one letter at a time; only dictionary words, no dead ends. Guessed tiles use green only vs the goal (no yellow). Optimal guess count is computed for each puzzle.

entries.title: Unscramble
entries.description: Green row shows word length only; letters not in the answer are dimmed on the keyboard. Three guesses.

entries.title: Alternating
entries.description: One board, two hidden words. Odd guesses score Word A, even score Word B until one is solved—then normal Wordle on the other. Twelve guesses total.

entries.title: Reverse
entries.description: Answer is known. Match any open row’s pattern to clear it; clock runs—beat your time.

entries.title: Multi 2
entries.description: Several hidden words at once. Each guess fills every unsolved grid. Solve up to 7 times before losing.

entries.title: Multi 4
entries.description: Several hidden words at once. Each guess fills every unsolved grid. Solve up to 9 times before losing.

entries.title: Multi 6
entries.description: Several hidden words at once. Each guess fills every unsolved grid. Solve up to 11 times before losing.

entries.title: Multi 8
entries.description: Several hidden words at once. Each guess fills every unsolved grid. Solve up to 13 times before losing.
